overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2 showing a Space Marine in power armor engaging Tyranid enemies in dark gothic industrial ruins. The character alternates between melee chainsword combat and ranged bolter fire while navigating through debris, lava hazards, and energy barriers alongside allied marines.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic ruin corridor with scattered debris

events.description: Space Marine executes melee chainsword attacks on Tyranid warrior
close quarters combat with multiple Tyranid enemies using heavy melee strikes

agents.ego_description: engaging Tyranid enemies in close quarters with chainsword, dodging and striking in enclosed ruins

notable_agents.action: Tyranid warrior attacking with claws and teeth
Tyranid creature lunging toward the player

entered.detail: tall weathered stone walls with gothic architectural details and arches
scattered metal sheets and barriers providing cover
massive support column with industrial gothic design
eerie blue and purple light emanating from distant warp rift or energy source

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow enclosed corridor of gothic ruins where the Space Marine engages in intense melee combat with Tyranid creatures. The environment features stone walls and scattered metal debris, illuminated by dim ambient light and a distant blue energy glow.

events.description: activates jump pack to ascend over obstacles and traverse gap
passing active lava fissures emitting orange glow and heat distortion

agents.ego_description: using jetpack to traverse vertical space then running across metal walkways, following allied marines ahead

notable_agents.action: allied Space Marine running ahead across the walkway

entered.detail: elevated metal platform with grid pattern flooring
cracks in the ground emitting glowing orange molten lava
large metal pipes running along the wall structure

segments.scene_description: The character activates a jump pack to traverse a gap, landing on an elevated metal grate walkway. The scene features industrial piping and active lava fissures providing the primary light source, with an allied marine visible ahead moving in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open combat arena with energy barrier backdrop

events.description: switches from running to aiming stance, raising bolter to shoulder
firing bolter rounds at distant Tyranid targets near the energy barrier

agents.ego_description: taking cover behind stone debris and aiming down sights at distant enemies, firing controlled bursts

notable_agents.action: Tyranid warrior advancing toward the player near the blue energy field

entered.detail: large vertical wall of crackling blue and purple warp energy blocking the background
tall ruined columns framing the combat area
fallen metal structure providing partial cover

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider combat arena dominated by a massive blue energy barrier in the background. The Space Marine takes cover behind stone pillars and metal barricades, engaging in ranged combat with bolter fire against Tyranids advancing from the energy field.

scene_state.functional_zone: open ruined plaza approaching extraction zone

events.description: closing distance to engage in melee combat with charging Tyranid
moving from enclosed ruins into open area with visible sky and distant structures

agents.ego_description: charging forward while fighting, transitioning from ranged to melee against remaining enemies

notable_agents.action: Tyranid creature attempting to flank and attack

entered.detail: dark night sky visible above the ruined industrial complex
silhouetted factory buildings and towers in the far background
burning debris and small fires illuminating the ground

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions to a more open ruined plaza where the sky becomes visible above the industrial complex. The Space Marine pushes forward through scattered fires, engaging in final melee combat while moving toward distant industrial structures on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through claustrophobic gothic ruins that gradually expand into a wide, open-air industrial plaza. It begins in a narrow enclosed corridor of stone and metal debris where a Space Marine engages in intense melee combat under a dim blue glow. As the character activates a jump pack to cross a gap, the scene shifts to an elevated metal walkway illuminated by the orange glare of active lava fissures and industrial piping. The environment then opens into a wider combat arena dominated by a massive blue energy barrier, where the camera tracks the marine taking cover behind stone pillars during a ranged bolter engagement. Finally, the view pushes forward through scattered fires into a ruined plaza, revealing the sky above as the combat moves toward distant industrial structures on the horizon.
